title: Google Drive API Client Setup - Design Specification
response:
Feedback Summary (1 comments):

General Comments:
1. Backend should use class-based DTO (implement DTO types in share package) for request and response bodies.
Refer to https://docs.nestjs.com/techniques/validation#mapped-types .
